checkpoint.defaultIntro: Answer all questions and submit the checkpoint when you are ready.
checkpoint.preTitle: Check your readiness before the lessons
checkpoint.preIntro: Start with a short entry checkpoint to unlock the learning flow and set your baseline before moving into the lesson sequence.
checkpoint.preNote: You have {attempts, plural, one {# attempt} other {# attempts}} for this checkpoint.
checkpoint.postTitle: Complete the module with a final knowledge check
checkpoint.postIntro: This closing checkpoint verifies understanding after the lessons and determines whether the module can be marked as completed.
checkpoint.postNote: You have {attempts, plural, one {# attempt} other {# attempts}} for this checkpoint.
checkpoint.noteSuffix: Answer every question, then submit when you are ready.

submissionPanel.ready: Everything is ready. You can submit this checkpoint now.
submissionPanel.notReady: Answer all questions to unlock submission.

review.title: Your answers have been reviewed
review.description: Review the result below. Each question includes clear feedback and the correct answer is highlighted.
review.incorrectFeedback: This answer is not correct for this question.

completed.title: You’ve completed this learning module
completed.description: Your lesson progression and checkpoint history have been saved. You can now return to the module overview, or continue exploring the rest of the curriculum.
completed.whatsNextDescription: Retake the module from the beginning, revisit the overview, or move on to another related topic.

certificate.availableDescription: Your English certificate is ready to download.
certificate.lockedDescription: Certificates are issued only after passing the final checkpoint. Retake the module to unlock your certificate.

confirmSubmit.title: Submit this checkpoint now?
confirmSubmit.description: This will save your current answers and open the full feedback review for this attempt.
confirmSubmit.afterSubmit: After submission you’ll see which answers were correct, along with feedback and explanation for the reviewed questions.

confirmRetake.title: Start this module again from the beginning?
confirmRetake.description: This will reset your current progress, lesson state, and checkpoint attempts for this module.
confirmRetake.note: Your saved history for this current run will be cleared and the module will reopen at the opening checkpoint.

ScenarioPlayerFrame.errorTitle: The scenario could not be opened
ScenarioPlayerFrame.errorDescription: The interactive content is currently unavailable or took too long to respond. Please try again.
ScenarioPlayerFrame.notReadyDescription: This scenario is not ready to launch yet. Please return later or choose another scenario.

scormErrors.runtimeNotInitialized: The SCORM runtime has not been initialized.
scormErrors.noDiagnostics: No additional diagnostic information is available.
